name: Gap
summary: Gap achieved a F (32.5/100) due to their explicit performance across our three pillars. In Planet, they fall behind with 30.9/100 due to a severe lack of verifiable environmental or material transparency commitments. In People, they score a concerning 37.0/100, indicating severe gaps in verified supplier audits or significant government red flags (OSHA/CBP violations). Finally, in Animals, they score 25.0/100 because of an absence of strict public animal welfare commitments or certified raw material tracking.

fti.name: Fashion Transparency Index
fti.context: Gap Inc. scored in the 51-60% range. Covers Gap, Old Navy, Banana Republic, Athleta.

ktc.name: KnowTheChain Benchmark
ktc.publisher: KnowTheChain / Business & Human Rights Resource Centre
ktc.context: Gap Inc. scored 40/100, above industry average of 21. Covers Gap, Old Navy, Banana Republic, Athleta.
